title: Atoz 6 Squeaky Matching Eggs, Lifelike, Yellow
features: EDUCATIONAL TOY: Interactive matching game featuring 6 colourful squeaky eggs with unique facial expressions, perfect for developing cognitive and motor skills
MATCHING GAME: Each egg splits into two parts that can be mixed and matched, encouraging shape recognition and problem-solving abilities
STORAGE DESIGN: Comes in a sturdy yellow egg carton container that keeps all pieces organized and makes cleanup simple
COMPLETE SET: Includes 6 eggs with different coloured tops and matching bottoms, housed in a specially designed carrying case
Remove the Top of the Egg to reveal a "Chick"
description: Product Description Introduce your little ones to the joy of learning with AtoZ's Squeaky Matching Eggs! This delightful educational toy features six charming eggs, each adorned with adorable expressions and housed in a bright yellow carton. Perfect for developing fine motor skills, colour recognition, and matching abilities, these eggs make learning fun and engaging. Each egg splits into two parts that can be mixed and matched, creating an entertaining shape-sorting challenge. The sturdy plastic construction ensures durability, while the squeaky feature adds an element of surprise and excitement. The compact egg carton design makes storage simple and teaches organisational skills. Ideal for toddlers and preschoolers, this interactive toy encourages problem-solving, hand-eye coordination, and creative play. Watch as your child discovers the satisfaction of correctly matching the eggs while developing essential early learning skills. The set's portable size makes it perfect for both home and travel entertainment. Directions Split the eggs into two parts, mix and match them to play the shape recognition game.
